fields.title: Official Company Letterhead
fields.subject: Zenith Eclipse ERP Document Design
fields.body:
This letterhead template is part of the Zenith Eclipse ERP document engine. Use it for official company letters, design proposals, authorization letters and general correspondence.

Prepared for: Zenith Eclipse Co
Purpose: Professional letterhead, proforma invoice, sales invoice and quotation design inside the ERP software.
fields.remarks: Use Print / Save PDF from the browser to export official letters.

fields.notes: Selectable bank account for document templates

audit.details: Imported uploaded old backup and added letterhead, proforma invoice, sales invoice and quotation design proposal templates

settings.passwordPolicy: Minimum 8 characters recommended for real use
settings.storage: Local JSON database with imported Zenith Eclipse backup seed
settings.seededFrom: Uploaded old backup JSON and uploaded quotation PDF design
settings.documentDesign: Quotation, letterhead, proforma invoice and sales invoice print templates are enabled
settings.documentBankPolicy: Bank details are hidden unless a saved bank account is selected on the document. Selected bank details print under Terms & Conditions only.
settings.securityUpdate: Login rate limit, stronger passwords, audit log and document fingerprint/QR verification enabled.
settings.workflowFooterPolicy: Vertical footer workflow with one document per line, same job reference, and different serial number per document type.
settings.verificationPolicy: QR code encodes the server verification URL based on the document serial number.
